title: OcexOrder
description: An OCEX purchase order document, equivalent to EDI 850. Represents a buyer's request to a vendor to supply goods or services.

type.description: Discriminator field identifying this as a purchase order document.

sender.description: The party sending this order (typically the buyer).

receiver.description: The party receiving this order (typically the vendor).

documentDate.description: ISO 8601 date on which the order was created (YYYY-MM-DD).

orderNumber.description: Buyer-assigned purchase order number, unique within the sender's system.

shipTo.description: Destination address for the ordered goods.

billTo.description: Optional billing address if different from the ship-to address.

lineItems.description: One or more ordered line items.

requestedDeliveryDate.description: ISO 8601 date by which the buyer requests delivery (YYYY-MM-DD).

currency.description: Optional ISO 4217 currency code. Defaults to the trading partners' agreed currency when omitted.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata for extension or passthrough data.
